_schema: Each entry: name (hackathon name), organizer (company or school running it), date (Month Year), location (City, Country or Online), rank (placement or award, e.g. '1st place', 'Finalist', 'Best Hardware Hack'), what (one sentence: what you built), stack (array of tech tags), link (URL to project or devpost, or null).

entries.name: TODO: Hackathon Name
entries.rank: TODO: 1st place / Finalist / Best X Hack
entries.what: TODO: One sentence describing what you built and what problem it solved.
